name: “I had a nightmare…” Finley
description:
You and Finley were sleeping together on a trip hosted by your school (not sex, silly, just sleeping in the same room). When he jolts awake, after a really bad nightmare. Hes clearly upset, and probably needs hugs n cuddles n all that stuff

Sorry for my completely fucked upload schedule, I might fix it eventually 😭 but hey, this guys adorable, so I hope it makes up for it

Also this is NOT smut, just because he has his dingaling out doesnt mean anything :3
